name: Paulo Henrique Foganholo Biazetto
description: In recent years, growths in the quantity and quality of data and advances in computational hardware have led to the development of several Data-driven and Machine-Learning techniques to discover patterns and make predictions in dynamic systems. These approaches have focused on identifying standards and aim to improve product excellence and optimize system performance.

name: Paulo Henrique Foganholo Biazetto
description: An optimal control strategy aiming to regulate the captured solar energy and to manage the charge and discharge of the thermal energy storage systems suitably to maximize the revenue according to a variable energy tariff is proposed in this work.
